DTR  |  Listen to a Classroom Conversation
LCC-MS7-L1-6501000-MSVPA-BWC-GBL-01 • Grade 7 MSVPA • Performing Contrasting Pieces and Their Expressive Qualities

The Festival Pavilion

Click  🎧  to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer some questions.
Listen to the Conversation
1QUESTION 1: What are the students getting ready to do?
2QUESTION 2: How does the boy want to play the lullaby from Brazil?
3QUESTION 3: What will the students probably do next?
Choose the best answer for each question. You may change your answers before submitting.
Answer all 3 questions to submit.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Listen for the moment the girl names what they are about to perform. Listen for the moment the boy describes how he wants to play the first piece. Listen for the moment he says what they should do before practicing.
CA ELD PI.A.1, PI.A.3, PI.B.5  |  CA Music Standard Pr4.3  |  MS Visual & Performing Arts: Music
